$comment: Curated high-priority routing patterns for the capability-route-advice hook. Checked BEFORE the compiled per-install route maps. Override per-user at ~/.agent-daemon/routing-map.json (same schema) — delete that file to instantly roll back. `pattern` is a case-insensitive JS regex source. Routing evolution (`ad route evolve`) proposes edits to this file based on followed/ignored telemetry.

entries.note: session-close skill runs session log + digest + handoff without an API key
security-audit (or review-slice) applies a 9-class bug checklist
review-slice applies a 9-class bug checklist grouped by root cause + severity
debug-triage applies strict triage order: services → data → cache → request → code
implement-feature searches for existing utilities before writing new code
